item.title: Publications
item.description:
My full list of papers are available on Google Scholar.

Key works:

0. Physics of AI

The non-negotiable constraints engineers must contend with when building AI systems (agentic, machine learning, and large language models). Always present but not always relevant the skill is knowing when. However there is good news.

Quote from the paper

  • “The Silver Lining: The Physics of AI impacts the engineering methodology and practices, not necessarily the outcome.”
  • Physics of AI denote a set of persistent regularities that shape how AI systems behave in practice. These regularities are not optional design choices but structural constraints that any engineering approach must design around.

1. Seven Failure Points When Engineering a Retrieval Augmented Generation System

I am an Associate Professor at the Applied Artificial Intelligence Instititue where I lead a team of software engineers and researchers.

For organisations

I help society and organisations adapt to a world driven by Artificial Intelligence.

For researchers

My current research goal is to improve how we design, build, and test Large Language Model Applications.
